### Post by chazwr on 2010-02-21
Greetings,

When I insert a cd into the cdrom (any type, music, data, blank) the links on my desktop disappear and all file managers stop working. (Nautilus and Gnome-Commander). The drive worked fine w/ 9.04 and w/ Windows

System Info:
Dell Inspiron 8200
OS = Karmic 9.10

etc/fstab:
# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
#  -- This file has been automaticly generated by ntfs-config -- 
#
# <file system> <mount point>   <type>  <options>       <dump>  <pass>

proc /proc proc defaults 0 0
# Entry for /dev/sda5 :
UUID=96ce7ea1-1ab8-4538-a4a0-f693271587ad / ext4 errors=remount-ro 0 1
# Entry for /dev/sda6 :
UUID=fa2cdf6b-3604-465d-af9a-513819b5358e none swap sw 0 0
/dev/scd1 /media/cdrom udf,iso9660 user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0
/dev/fd0 /media/floppy0 auto rw,user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0
/dev/sda1 /media/Windows ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0

/$ ls -l /dev |grep cd
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root           3 2010-02-21 17:23 cdrom -> sr1
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root           3 2010-02-21 17:23 cdrom1 -> sr0
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root           3 2010-02-21 17:23 cdrw1 -> sr0
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root          60 2010-02-21 11:23 pktcdvd
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root           3 2010-02-21 11:23 scd0 -> sr0
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root           3 2010-02-21 11:23 scd1 -> sr1
crw-rw----  1 root cdrom    21,   1 2010-02-21 11:23 sg1
crw-rw----  1 root cdrom    21,   2 2010-02-21 11:23 sg2
brw-rw----+ 1 root cdrom    11,   0 2010-02-21 11:23 sr0
brw-rw----+ 1 root cdrom    11,   1 2010-02-21 11:23 sr

Thanks for any advice.
